text_block_list.text: After training, I find Sky looking up something on her phone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The calm expression and that curled up, innocent tail...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And to retain so much detail, even scaled down to fit in your hand.
Truly a soul-soothing masterpiece...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah. No worries, just me rambling.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That reminds me, do you have any plans on our next day off?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to get some new shoes and was wondering if you
wanted to come with?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right, then let's hit the mall this weekend!

And so, on our day off, I visit the mall with Sky to look for some
shoes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, the sporting goods store should be right around—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah, I just saw something that caught my eye for a second.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at those mugs they're selling at that store over there. They're
rather cute, aren't they?
I follow her gaze to a display rack of mugs with whimsical cat designs.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aw...These kitties look so calm, like they could fall asleep at any
moment.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I bet my motivation would skyrocket if I could drink tea from a mug
like this before training.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whatever shall I do? Maybe I'll get it—ah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Look! Over there!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It says if you buy a set of two mugs, they'll give you a free cat-shaped
key chain!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A super cute kitty key chain, all for the measly price of two mugs!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's a steal! They've reeled me in!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That said, I only need one mug. Hmm...
Sky continues to act conflicted for a little while longer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: By the way, this is totally unrelated, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer... do you by chance have a mug of your own?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: From what I can remember, I get the feeling you don't, do you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa there, what are you implying?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I just passed here by chance when I suddenly got the urge to buy this
kitty mug. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You could use a mug yourself, and since you don't have one, isn't this
a perfect opportunity?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just picture it—sipping tea out of matching mugs with your
trainee before training...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it give off that "tightly-knit" vibe? Lavishly lovely, dont you
think?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: At the very least, I certainly think so... Hint, hint.
choice_data_list: If you want it that badly...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're in?
choice_data_list: This'll make you more motivated, right?
This'll make you more motivated, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, that's my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can count on you to keep your trainee's motivation peaked at all
times.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay then, let's buy one each.
choice_data_list: I'll buy both. Be right back.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

I leave Seiun Sky waiting as I walk over to the register and purchase
two mugs.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Man, you're so mature! That was smooth!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I didn't think you would buy my mug too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I think you just leveled up our bond again. Da-dada-daaah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you say that like you didn't just buy me a present. Be more
honest with yourself, you sly dog, you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, as soon as we get back, let's fill these bad boys with some
tea!
